ocr.text: In a survey of healthcare facilities, the data revealed that among the six district hospitals, functioning refrigerators for vaccine
storage were found in all 6 hospitals, filled oxygen cylinders were also present in all 6, while flow meters for oxygen were
available in 6 hospitals, and incubators for emergency neonatal care were found in 3 hospitals. Additionally, warmers for
emergency neonatal care were noted in 1 hospital, and weighing scales in in-patient departments were present in 5 hospitals.
Number of district hospitals in which item was found (n=6)  Number of sub-district hospitals in which item was found (n=12)
Functioning refrigerators for vaccine storage  6  12
Filled Oxygen cylinders  6  12
Flow meters for Oxygen  6  9
Incubators for emergency neonatal care  3  3
Warmers for emergency neonatal care  1  0
Weighing scales in in-patient departments  5  7
cell systems  Number of mice with tumors (n = 2)  Mean time of tumor appearance (weeks)
SM-AP1  2  7.5
SM-AP2  1  9
SM-AP3  1  19
SM-AP4  1  5
SM-AP5  2  9
In the context of sub-district hospitals, functioning refrigerators for vaccine storage were identified in all 12 hospitals, filled
oxygen cylinders were also found in all 12, while flow meters for oxygen were available in 9 hospitals. Incubators for
emergency neonatal care were located in 3 hospitals, warmers for emergency neonatal care were absent in all, and weighing
scales in in-patient departments were found in 7 hospitals. In an experimental study on tumor development, the data indicated
that within the cell system SM-AP1, 2 out of 2 mice developed tumors with a mean time of tumor appearance at 7.5 weeks, in
SM-AP2, 1 mouse developed a tumor at 9 weeks, in SM-AP3, 1 mouse developed a tumor at 19 weeks, in SM-AP4, 1 mouse
developed a tumor at 5 weeks, and in SM-AP5, 2 mice developed tumors at 9 weeks.
